code:
sequenceDiagram participant User participant Claude participant fspec reverse participant Session File participant Project Files User->>Claude: I have legacy code, need specs Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse fspec reverse->>Session File: Create .reverse-session.json fspec reverse->>Project Files: Scan for feature files fspec reverse->>Project Files: Scan for test files fspec reverse->>Project Files: Scan for implementation fspec reverse->>Session File: Save analysis results fspec reverse->>Claude:
Analysis complete
Found gaps Claude->>User: Found 3 test files without features User->>Claude: Let's do Strategy A Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --strategy=A fspec reverse->>Session File: Set strategy=A, phase=executing fspec reverse->>Claude:
Step 1/3 guidance
Read test file... Claude->>Project Files: Read src/__tests__/legacy.test.ts Claude->>fspec reverse: (Logistics_Warehouse) Claude->>fspec reverse: (Logistics_StockLevel) Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --continue fspec reverse->>Session File: Increment currentStep to 2 fspec reverse->>Claude:
Step 2/3 guidance
Next file... Note over Claude,fspec reverse: Repeat for each gap Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --continue fspec reverse->>Session File: Increment currentStep to 3 fspec reverse->>Claude:
Step 3/3 guidance
Final file... Claude->>fspec reverse: (Logistics_TrackingNumber) Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --complete fspec reverse->>Session File: Validate all work done fspec reverse->>Session File: Delete session file fspec reverse->>Claude:
Session complete
All gaps filled Claude->>User: ✅ Reverse ACDD complete
repo_description: fspec is the holy grail: a complete spec-driven system that shepherds AI through professional Gherkin scenarios, auto-generates tests from Given/When/Then criteria, enforces TDD discipline, and links

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们有一批遗留代码需要反向生成规格文档，我想用fspec reverse工具来处理。流程应该是User先向Claude提出需求，然后Claude调用fspec reverse，最后生成Session File来跟踪整个会话状态。
明白。那fspec reverse启动后，除了创建.reverse-session.json，是不是还需要扫描Project Files？比如feature files、test files和implementation这三类？
对，扫描这三类文件后，把分析结果存回Session File。然后fspec reverse会给Claude返回一个system-reminder，提示分析完成并发现缺口。
好的，Claude收到提醒后向User反馈：找到了3个没有对应feature的test files。然后User决定采用Strategy A，Claude再次调用fspec reverse并带上--strategy=A参数。
这时候Session File要更新状态，设置strategy=A和phase=executing。然后进入分步执行，Claude开始读取具体的测试文件，比如src/__tests__/legacy.test.ts。
我注意到这里Claude和fspec reverse之间有一些括号标注，像(Logistics_Warehouse)、(Logistics_StockLevel)，这些是代表扫描到的领域概念吗？
没错，这些是识别出的物流领域实体。每处理完一个，Claude就调用--continue进入下一步，Session File里的currentStep从1变成2，再变成3。
第三步处理完Logistics_TrackingNumber后，Claude调用--complete，Session File验证所有工作完成，然后删除自身，最后Claude向User报告Reverse ACDD完成。
